sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.1. 产品简介.message: Explains what RDK Studio is, its architecture and scope, and covers the feature matrix, supported hardware, release notes, and hands-on AI Dock demos to build a mental model before you dive in.
sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.1. 产品简介.description: The generated-index page description for category 1. 产品简介 in sidebar tutorialSidebar

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.2. 快速入门.message: The shortest path for new users: install and sign in, flash system images, connect the board over SSH, Type-C, or serial, then configure network and AI models and run your first conversation.
sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.2. 快速入门.description: The generated-index page description for category 2. 快速入门 in sidebar tutorialSidebar

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.3. 用户指南.message: Feature-by-feature guidance: dashboard, AI chat, remote terminal and file manager, remote IDE, remote desktop, flashing, networking, device management, OpenClaw, skills, configuration center, and more.
sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.3. 用户指南.description: The generated-index page description for category 3. 用户指南 in sidebar tutorialSidebar

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.4. 资源与社.message: Pointers to skill sharing and acquisition, NodeHub case studies, and other resources so you can go beyond the core docs and engage with the community.
sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.4. 资源与社.description: The generated-index page description for category 4. 资源与社区 in sidebar tutorialSidebar

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.5. 常见问题.message: Troubleshooting for common issues: SSH, Type-C flash, camera, model loading, WiFi, remote IDE, multi-device switching, token usage, model quality, and VNC or desktop latency.
sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.5. 常见问题.description: The generated-index page description for category 5. 常见问题 in sidebar tutorialSidebar
